case_title: LEONARD, ROBIN et al VS KEEGAN, KENNETH W. : PRES./KGE SAN FRANCISCO, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
